vulnerability.reference: Application developers over-rely on visual explanations without verifying underlying model behavior.
vulnerability.generated: Developers rely on imprecise feature attribution that maps object information into cross-attention, enabling manipulation to produce editing failures.

impact.reference: Erosion of user trust in AI-assisted creative tools after repeated editing failures.
impact.generated: Unintended object modifications and editing failures in image outputs undermine developer trust and tool reliability.

dose_response.reference: Manipulated feature attribution maps enable adversarial cross-attention map alterations, which in text-guided image editing tools expose developers to unintended object modifications, leading to erosion of user trust.
dose_response.generated: Feature attribution maps containing manipulable object attribution information, through application developers using tuning-free text-guided image editing tools, trigger reliance on imprecise cross-attention mapping that enables object manipulation, leading to unintended object modifications and editing failures that undermine trust and reliability.
